response.original_title: Les haricots ne poussent pas en ligne droite
response.overview: Thierry Laforest, a farmer in Saint-Rémy-de-Provence, practiced conventional farming for 40 years before suddenly turning to permaculture. His once-standard farm has become a testing ground for sustainable agriculture. Through his stories and the transmission of his know-how, Thierry presents the possibility of a model that respects ecosystems, transforming the way of life and the relationship to work, nature, and time for those who embrace it.
response.title: Les haricots ne poussent pas en ligne droite
